prompt: My pixie-test run just showed 3 failures in my qa-golden-set tests. The test output just says 'Average score: 0.41, all >= 0.5: False'. I have no idea which test cases are failing or why. How do I investigate and fix this?
assertions: Suggests running pixie-test -v for verbose output showing per-case reasoning
Explains how to find trace_id in eval_metadata of failing dataset items
Shows code to inspect a trace using ObservationStore.get_trace() or similar
Covers possible root causes (bad prompt, retrieval issue, wrong expected_output, criteria too strict)
Explains the iteration loop: fix -> re-run -> compare
Mentions ScoreThreshold as a way to relax criteria if expectations were too strict
